title: AP invoice processing: $10 → $3 per invoice opportunity
pain_description: Invoice arrives (email/PDF/paper); AP keys in; matches PO; routes for approval; posts GL. 14.6-day cycle.
incumbent_gap: OCR layers; not full agentic AP
santifer_pattern: Email intake + OCR + 3-way match + approval router + GL post agent

verbatim_quotes.quote: Some pdf's do not upload properly missing the content of the invoice, thus causing duplicate work to upload the invoice in the attachments for other approvers to view.
Stampli incorrectly coded an invoice to a different vendor based on the invoice format. It did not pick up the vendor name listed on the invoice.

reference_build: SAP/NetSuite AP AI achieves $2.94/invoice vs $10.18 manual

title: AR collections: DSO reduction via intelligent outreach
pain_description: Past-due invoices; generic dunning emails; DSO 45-60 days; write-offs.
santifer_pattern: Customer health + payment history + tailored AR agent (call/email)

title: Month-end close: 10-day close → 3-day target
pain_description: Reconciliations + accruals + flux analysis + reports - entire team's life for 10 days/month.
santifer_pattern: Ledger + sub-ledger + bank → reconciliation agent + accrual drafter + flux commentary

verbatim_quotes.quote: the stress of month-end close is a clear cause of severe burnout within the accounting profession

title: Expense report management: receipt → policy → reimburse
pain_description: Employees photograph receipts; categorize; admin reviews; policy violations slip; reimbursement lags.
incumbent_gap: Receipt OCR commoditized; policy-check agent underused
santifer_pattern: Photo + policy RAG + auto-approve compliant + flag outliers + AP push

title: FP&A variance commentary + board pack writing
pain_description: Actual vs budget variance commentary, board deck narrative, forward forecast - hours of exec writeups.
santifer_pattern: Data warehouse + variance agent + narrative-drafter + slide generator

title: Cash forecasting: 13-week rolling cash bank sync
pain_description: Weekly 13-week cash builds pulled from banks + ERP + AR; stale by Monday.
santifer_pattern: Bank APIs + ERP + agent predicts inflow/outflow + daily refresh
reference_build: SAP Joule Cash Management Agent — 80% manual reduction

title: Accountant firm: client document collection each season
pain_description: Tax season: clients miss docs; partner chases; deadlines threaten. Email spam + portals ignored.
santifer_pattern: Checklist + client WhatsApp/SMS agent + auto-remind + doc-classify + partner dashboard

title: E-commerce bookkeeping reconciliation (Shopify/Amazon)
pain_description: Shopify payouts + Amazon fees + ads + shipping + returns — monthly reconciliation hell.
incumbent_gap: Point solutions per channel; no full consolidation
santifer_pattern: Channel connectors + reconciliation agent + COGS allocation + tax prep ready

title: Recruiting agency: candidate pipeline + req matching
pain_description: CRM dies; candidates lost; hot reqs not matched; fees missed.
santifer_pattern: Resume parse + job-match agent + outreach + interview scheduler

title: In-house recruiting: passive candidate sourcing
pain_description: LinkedIn Recruiter searches + generic messages → 5% response; time to hire 45+ days.
santifer_pattern: Sourcing agent + personalized outreach per candidate + cadence + ATS push

verbatim_quotes.quote: InMail costs $5.67-$8.35 per message and averages a 6.4% reply rate, which is notably low.

reference_build: Lyzr case studies — resume filter, time-to-hire 45d → 18d

title: Onboarding new hires: first-day productivity ramp
pain_description: New hires need systems, docs, context; 90-day productivity slow; retention risk.
santifer_pattern: Role-specific onboarding agent + doc RAG + Q&A + manager status

title: Performance review cycles: bias + busywork
pain_description: Self-review + manager review + calibration; text quality uneven; bias creeps; cycle 6+ weeks.
incumbent_gap: Workflow; no AI drafting from signals
santifer_pattern: Signal (goals, feedback, 1:1s) + LLM draft + bias-check + calibration support

title: Learning & development: skill-gap → training path
pain_description: Generic LMS courses; no personalization; completion < 30%; skill gaps persist.
santifer_pattern: Skill assessment + gap agent + curated learning path + knowledge checks

title: IT service desk: password resets, access provisioning
pain_description: High-volume mundane tickets (password, access, VPN); IT burn out; users wait hours.
santifer_pattern: Intent classifier + IdP integration + self-serve agent + handoff on edge cases

verbatim_quotes.quote: Password resets can become mundane and frustrating because they don't challenge you. Over 37% of companies spent more than 6 hours a week on password resets.

reference_build: Modern (YC) resolves 80%+ of high-volume IT requests

title: DevOps alert fatigue + incident first-response
pain_description: PagerDuty floods; 80% false alarms; real incidents buried; MTTR suffers.
santifer_pattern: Alert correlation agent + runbook execution + post-mortem drafter

title: Customer support ticket triage at scale
pain_description: 100s of tickets/day; agents manually route, tag, prioritize; SLAs slip.
incumbent_gap: Sierra/Fin own enterprise; SMB still thin
santifer_pattern: Ticket intake agent + auto-tag + auto-resolve (tier-1) + escalation brief

verbatim_quotes.quote: 100+ tickets can be handled within four hours through prioritization and tagging in automated systems.

reference_build: Sierra (CLEAR, Casper, SoFi), Lyzr retail support

title: Email triage for executives / support leads
pain_description: 200+ emails/day; priorities buried; response SLAs missed.
incumbent_gap: Email clients; not full workflow agents
santifer_pattern: Classifier + draft replies + CRM/doc writeback + task creation

title: Manufacturing MES / work order lifecycle
pain_description: Work orders on paper + Excel; rework cycles hidden; scrap unexplained.
santifer_pattern: Work order SSOT + voice/tablet + machine IoT + AI anomaly on scrap

title: Field QA/inspection for food & beverage
pain_description: FDA/SQF audits; batch records; deviation reports; paper or spreadsheets.
santifer_pattern: Inspector photo + voice + LLM compliance check + deviation flow
reference_build: Tracktile ($1.25M seed for SMB F&B manufacturers)

title: Freight broker TMS: load matching + rate negotiation
pain_description: Loads posted on DAT/Truckstop; brokers call 20 carriers; rates negotiated by phone; paper rate cons.
santifer_pattern: Load intake + carrier-voice agent + rate-negotiation + rate-con auto-gen

title: Real estate agent: CRM hygiene + transaction milestones
pain_description: Leads from Zillow + referrals + sphere; follow-up inconsistent; deals fall through on process gaps.
santifer_pattern: Lead intake + drip with LLM personalization + transaction checklist

title: HOA management: violations + communications
pain_description: 370K HOAs; violation letters, hearings, fines, CC&R interpretations — state-specific compliance.
santifer_pattern: Photo/report intake + violation classifier + state-rule drafter + hearing workflow

title: Property management: maintenance request triage
pain_description: Tenant texts broken AC → PM calls vendor → schedules → bills → reports owner. Cycle takes days.
santifer_pattern: Tenant WhatsApp intake + classifier + vendor dispatch + owner report

title: CRE broker: listing comps + tour scheduling
pain_description: CoStar + Reonomy subs expensive; still manual comp pulls; tour coordination across 10 principals.
santifer_pattern: Comp RAG + brochure generator + tour scheduler + LOI drafter

title: Insurance brokerage: client review + remarketing
pain_description: Annual renewal reviews; remarket to carriers for best rate; summary deck; spreadsheet hell.
santifer_pattern: Client context + carrier-rate pull + recommendation memo + client deck

title: Hotel housekeeping: room-ready + maintenance ticket
pain_description: Front desk can't tell which rooms ready; maintenance tickets on paper; guest experience suffers.
santifer_pattern: Airtable room status + voice update + maintenance routing + front-desk dashboard

title: Restaurant ops: supplier orders + menu costing
pain_description: Daily supplier orders; price volatility; menu costing ignored; margin erodes.
santifer_pattern: Ordering agent + invoice match + recipe costing + menu recommendation

title: Fitness / beauty studio: class + membership + retention
pain_description: Class scheduling + memberships + late-cancellations + retention — all with $60K/yr labor savings potential per a16z.
santifer_pattern: Studio OS: intake + retention agent + class optimization + LTV uplift

title: Music / dance / martial arts school ops
pain_description: Recurring lessons, recital planning, parent comms, billing — 4 tools taped together.
santifer_pattern: Airtable students + WhatsApp parent agent + recital planner + billing auto

title: Preschool / daycare: daily log + parent comms
pain_description: Daily activity logs per child + parent updates + food logs + meds — teachers overwhelmed.
santifer_pattern: Voice daily-log + photo → AI caption → parent feed + compliance records
